action.query: PRP treatment for hair loss in Katy Texas

content.text:
Based on a web search, here are some clinics and medspas in or near Katy, Texas, that offer Platelet-Rich Plasma (PRP) treatments specifically for hair loss or restoration. PRP involves using your own blood plasma to stimulate hair growth, and it's a non-surgical option. I recommend contacting them directly for availability, pricing, consultations, and to confirm they suit your needs (as details can change). Always consult a healthcare professional before starting any treatment.

### Clinics in Katy, TX:
- **Integrative Primary Care**: Led by Dr. Syed Farhat Zaidi, this clinic offers PRP for hair restoration to help reclaim lost hair.[[1]](https://www.integrativeprimarycare.net/services/hair-loss) Location: Katy, TX (multiple Houston-area sites).
- **Luminous MediSpa**: Provides PRP hair restoration to rejuvenate and stimulate hair growth.[[2]](https://luminousmedispa.com/prp-hair-restoration) Located in Katy.
- **Luxe Medical Aesthetics**: Offers PRP for restoring thinning hair, among other uses.[[3]](https://theluxeeffect.com/our-services/prp) Located in Katy.
- **Texas RICH**: Specializes in PRP therapy for hair restoration.[[4]](https://www.texasrich2020.com/platelet-rich-plasma-therapy-regenerative-therapy-houston-tx.html) Locations include Katy, Sugar Land, The Woodlands, and Houston.
- **4Ever Young Anti-Aging**: Combines PRP with other treatments like HydraFacial Keravive for hair loss.[[5]](https://4everyoungantiaging.com/katy/whole-body-wellness/hair-loss-treatment-with-prp) Located in Katy.
- **Ageless MedSpa**: Uses noninvasive PRP therapy for hair restoration.[[6]](https://agelessmedspakaty.com/hair-restoration) Located in Katy.
- **Aesthetic Master Infusions LLC**: Offers PRP for promoting hair growth.[[7]](https://www.aestheticmasterinfusions.com/prp) Located in Katy.

### Nearby Options (Houston Area):
If you're open to a short drive, clinics like Kelsey-Seybold (with locations in the greater Houston area) offer PRP for hair loss to thicken and regrow hair.[[8]](https://www.kelsey-seybold.com/medical-services-and-specialties/dermatology/services/cosmetic/prp-for-hair-loss) Dr. Kristy L. Hamilton in Houston also provides PRP hair restoration.[[9]](https://www.drkristyhamilton.com/skin/prp-hair-restoration)

For the most current info, search for reviews on sites like Google or Yelp, or check with your doctor for recommendations. If you need more details on any of these, let me know!
